results.name: Login page renders
results.reasoning: Login page displays correctly with split-screen design - dark left panel shows Sportsphere branding, community tagline, feature list, and stats; right panel has functional sign in form with email/password fields, Sign In button, and Create Account option. Layout is complete and working as expected.

results.name: Invalid credentials rejected
results.reasoning: L2 FAIL: No error message or red toast notification is visible after attempting to sign in with invalid credentials (fake-nonexistent-user@example.com). The user appears to still be on the login page, but there should be a clear error indication for failed authentication attempts.
